prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document presents statistics and data specific to England regarding hospital tooth extractions in the 0 to 19 age group, including details about extraction episodes, regional variations, and trends based on local authorities and NHS regions, indicating its applicability only to England.
